---
title: "fig1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### TBD: Clarify

\*\*Get Taxon ID (see py scripts - TBD)

**Get Taxonomy info from species name (this work but do this once - take forever)**

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
library(xml2)

get_phylum_from_taxid <- function(taxid) {
  tryCatch({
    xml_data <- entrez_fetch(db = "taxonomy", id = taxid, rettype = "xml")
    doc <- read_xml(xml_data)
    lineage <- xml_text(xml_find_first(doc, "//Lineage"))
    
    if (is.na(lineage) || lineage == "") return("Uknown")
    
    ranks <- strsplit(lineage, ";\\s*")[[1]]
    
    # Known fungal phyla (standard set)
    fungal_phyla <- c("Ascomycota", "Basidiomycota", "Blastocladiomycota",
                      "Chytridiomycota", "Cryptomycota", "Microsporidia",
                      "Mucoromycota", "Olpidiomycota", "Zoopagomycota")

    match <- intersect(fungal_phyla, ranks)
    if (length(match) > 0) {
      return(match[1])
    } else {
      return("Uknown")
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Error fetching taxonomy for TaxID", taxid, ":", conditionMessage(e)))
    return("Uknown")
  })
}

# test 
get_phylum_from_taxid("55514")

# Apply to all rows
info$TaxID <- sapply(info$Species, get_taxid_from_species)
#info$Subphylum <- sapply(info$TaxID, get_phylum_from_taxid)

# First: Set Subphylum to NA
info$Subphylum <- NA

# Apply only to rows with non-NA TaxID
valid_indices <- which(!is.na(info$TaxID))
#info$Subphylum[valid_indices] <- sapply(info$TaxID[valid_indices], get_phylum_from_taxid)

write.csv(info[, c("SpecID", "Subphylum")], "taxonomy_mapping.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

```

### panel B

```{r}

library(ape)
library(phytools)

sptree <- read.tree("tree/Species_Tree_With_tags.treefile")

# Midpoint root the tree
tree_mid <- midpoint.root(sptree)

taxonomy <- read.csv("metadata/taxonomy_mapping.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

## Map Subphylum and Colors to Clean Labels

# Map SpecID to Subphylum
subphylum_map <- setNames(taxonomy$Subphylum, taxonomy$SpecID)

# Get subphylum for each tip
tip_subphyla <- subphylum_map[tree_mid$tip.label]


# Define colors
phyla_colors <- c(
  "Ascomycota" = "red",
  "Basidiomycota" = "blue",
  "Blastocladiomycota" = "yellow",
  "Chytridiomycota" = "purple",
  "Cryptomycota" = "orange",
  "Microsporidia" = "pink",
  "Mucoromycota" = "darkgreen",
  "Olpidiomycota" = "violet",
  "Zoopagomycota" = "lightgreen",
  "Uknown" = "black"
)

# Assign colors
tip_colors <- phyla_colors[tip_subphyla]
tip_colors[is.na(tip_colors)] <- "black"

# Step 3: Plot with Clean Labels and Colors
#plotTree(tree, type = "fan", fsize = 0.5, tip.color = tip_colors)
plot.phylo(tree_mid, 
           type = "fan",
           tip.color = tip_colors,
           cex = 0.2, 
           no.margin = TRUE)
legend("topright", legend = names(phyla_colors), fill = phyla_colors, cex = 0.6, border = NA)

#pdf("Species_Tree.treefile.pdf")
#plot.phylo(tree_mid, 
#           type = "fan",
#           tip.color = tip_colors,
#           cex = 0.2, 
#           no.margin = TRUE)
#legend("topright", legend = names(phyla_colors), fill = phyla_colors, cex = 0.6, border = NA)
#dev.off()

```

### panel D

```{r}
# Load required library
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read data
data <- read.csv("metadata/histone_class_taxonomy_mapping_revised.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Count ProtIDs by Subphylum
counts <- data %>%
  group_by(Subphylum) %>%
  summarise(Count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Separate NA and non-NA, then combine with NA at end
counts_no_na <- counts %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Subphylum) & Subphylum != "NA") %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

counts_na <- counts %>% 
  filter(is.na(Subphylum) | Subphylum == "NA")

counts <- bind_rows(counts_no_na, counts_na)

# Create factor with this exact order
counts$Subphylum <- factor(counts$Subphylum, 
                           levels = counts$Subphylum)

# Create barplot
ggplot(counts, aes(x = Subphylum, y = Count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#A7C7E7", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), hjust = -0.3, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(levels(counts$Subphylum))) +  # Reverse for coord_flip
  labs(title = "Number of Proteins by Subphylum",
       x = "Subphylum",
       y = "Count of ProtIDs") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Save plot
#ggsave("protid_by_subphylum.pdf", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
#ggsave("protid_by_subphylum.png", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Print counts table
print(counts)
```
